projectDescription: A browser-based 3D VR memory card game (Memorama) set in a horror-themed casino, built with A-Frame WebVR.
keyFeatures: Immersive 3D VR environment powered by A-Frame WebVR
Horror-themed casino atmosphere with flickering red lights and fog
Classic Memorama (memory card) gameplay with 4 pairs of cards
40-second countdown timer adding urgency to gameplay
Card flip animations with match/mismatch logic
Win/lose conditions with screen overlay effects
publicApiSurface: initGame() — shuffles and renders the card board
flip(card) — handles card flip logic and pair matching
